Spoiler Memo: Duskbright Steps

Hello Deepspace Hunters!

With the upcoming banner, Duskbright Steps, we would like to remind you that spoiler protocol must be followed for any new contents until 12:00 AM PST on March 3rd so as not to ruin any surprises for your fellow Hunters! As a good rule of thumb, if it wasn't shown in the trailers or any promotional images shared on Official Platforms, it is considered a spoiler.

Mod Memo : Post Approval via Moderation Queue Enabled

Hello, Hunters!

To help keep the subreddit organized, on-topic, and welcoming for everyone, we’ve enabled a post approval system using Reddit’s moderation queue.

⸻

**What’s changing?**

Effective immediately, all new posts will be automatically sent to the moderation queue for review before appearing on the subreddit.

⸻

**Why are we doing this?**

We’ve seen an increase in posts that don’t align with subreddit rules. Routing all posts through the moderation queue helps us maintain content quality and keep things fair for all our subreddit users.

⸻

**What does this mean for you?**

•    All submitted posts enter the moderation queue

•    A moderator will review your post before it goes live

•    If changes are needed, you may be contacted before approval

⸻

**How long does approval take?**

We aim to review posts as quickly as possible. Please note that delays may occur during high-traffic periods.

⸻

Thank you for your patience and understanding as we implement this change. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact the mod team via modmail.

We appreciate you being part of the community!

Not even a week with the new promise and I’ve already been blessed by this nightmare 😭 it’s the scarves all over again

Why doesn’t Infold “show instead of tell” more often?

You know the storytelling rule “show, don’t tell”? I feel like Infold misses a great opportunity with that sometimes.

For example, when the story mentions the photo of Zayne with Pie. Instead of just telling us about the photo, why not actually show it to the player?

It would be such a simple addition just a small illustration of the picture but it would add so much more immersion to the scene.

Considering how beautiful the art in the game already is, creating a small illustration of Zayne holding Pie (or a casual snapshot of them together) doesn’t seem like it would be very costly compared to the impact it could have on the narrative experience.

It’s a small detail, but it would make scenes like that feel much more alive.

Visuals are Stunning

No matter what people say they cannot hate on the visual aspects. The art and graphics are insane 😭✨ show me your favorite captures in the cards or main story.

HAPPY FISHIE DAY 🐟

it has been a stressful week for me, so I'm so excited to celebrate our dear fishie's birthday 🥹 he has always brought me comfort and I hope we get more birthdays with him!  🐟🩷 happy rafayel day to those who celebrate!!!! 🎉

In Celebration of Duskbright Steps: The Birthday Where Rafayel Chooses Belonging

Since today is Rafayel’s birthday, I wanted to take a moment to express how much I greatly appreciate this card(semi-long post ahead!).

Now for context, I’ve only been playing for about three months, so I admit there’s much of Rafayel’s story/character I haven’t experienced yet. I’m also a teacher, so I may have a soft spot for this card due to my profession lol. In essence, this opinion is from someone with relatively fresh eyes who has read the main story, anecdotes, previous two AU banners, and this birthday card.

I completely understand why expectations for his birthday were high this year. The 2025 card is visually breathtaking, and the line, “I brought the one I love home”, is truly iconic.

However, I really want to advocate for Duskbright Steps. While not as visually stimulating as Boundless Seas, Duskbright Steps offers an emotional depth that has had a lasting impact on me. So much so, I’ve practically written a whole essay for a LI that is not my main lol. 

So, without further ado, let’s begin.



**Expectations**

For starters, I think Zayne’s solo card trained us to expect something from Duskbright Steps that the writing team did not intend. When I read the critiques about how this card failed at delivering a proper student/teacher trope, I agreed completely. It did fail…because it wasn’t actually trying to deliver that trope at all. 

This isn’t the spicy “Professor Rafayel” of our dreams(which I’m still looking forward to btw). This is the conclusion of Rafayel’s professor arc from the anecdotes.

For Rafayel’s birthday this year, we celebrate a fractured man who is finally becoming whole.

In one of the earlier posts from Love and Deepspace promoting the card, they stated the following:

>“No exhibitions, no reception, no distractions. The students’ pure enthusiasm and sincere devotion fill his heart.

>Professor Rafayel’s reason for missing class? Your careful preparation has made him look forward to this day in a truly special way.”

These sentences are the entire foundation of the card. I’m going to use them to draw comparisons between the original “Professor Rafayel” we meet in the anecdotes. 



**Anecdote Review/Analysis**

In chapter one of Addictive Pain, Rafayel refers to his draw to Linkon City as an “addictive, painful kind \[of perception\]”. He is at the mercy of an attachment that compels him toward MC, while painfully binding him in the process. In this space, he both indulges and sacrifices himself. He is addicted to this cycle because he has never known love and desire without heartache and loss. The pattern is familiar. 

This is the version of Rafayel who first dons the title of “professor”. He enters into the world of academia only as a reasonable excuse to stay near MC; even though it is knowingly futile. He calls the idea of her appearing before him a “pipe dream”, and yet those dreams consume his very thoughts. 

Rafayel is tethered to MC and because she attends Linkon University, he is now tethered there as well. The school itself begins to house this “addictive pain” along with longing, surveillance, and unresolved trauma.  In a way, he is both trapped and comforted by misery. 

In Duskbright Steps, however, we see that same man choose a joy unencumbered by pain or suffering. It is freely given, and he has learned how to freely receive it. This university has transformed into a space of admiration and purpose for him. He no longer stays because he is addicted to pain. He stays because his heart is filled with the “pure enthusiasm and sincere devotion” of his students. This fishie has found a place of belonging on land. He has fallen in love with the art of education. 



**Duskbright Steps**

At the beginning of the card while Rafayel is lecturing from the podium, MC notices that he looks, “happier than before”, and, “is shining with vitality’s color”. She sees a shift in him and suspects that the university has something to do with it. This section is the build up to what I believe is the climax of the card. Rafayel revealing that he genuinely enjoys being a professor because it makes him happy. 

We also learn that while he could have canceled the classes that were scheduled on his birthday, he not only refrained from doing so, but has never canceled a class before…*ever*. Even though he often flakes on his professional art exhibitions and responsibilities.  

I believe the writers intended for us to share in Rafayel’s newfound joy and peace. Birthdays have meanings to him now, he has found community, he is chosen and loved without having to perform for it. What a beautiful birthday gift to both him and those who admire him. He deserves to receive every bit of what this card celebrates. 



**Why Professor Rafayel** 

I hope what I’ve shared so far makes it very clear why they went with Professor Rafayel this card, but there are a few more observations I wanted to share about it.

This birthday was a true love letter to the Addictive Pain anecdote. He mentions that he was only supposed to stay a professor for a year, and also that he came there for “other reasons”. I believe the cake MC refers to in the cafe scene is related to the anecdote as well. When Rafayel was listening in on MC’s conversation with her friends, they were talking about a cake named, “Sea Salt Cheese”. I wonder if Rafayel went back to try it and that’s why he was in the cafe records for having picked one up  I may be wrong. 

Most romantically though was the reference to “50 steps”. In the anecdote he had counted the distance between the billboard he was standing at, and the building he just found out she may be taking classes in. In the birthday card they found themselves by that same billboard and building. While MC tries to guess how far they may be standing away from it, Rafayel very confidently says, “50 steps”. That distance is forever etched into his heart and mind omg. 



**Final Thoughts and TL;DR**



In closing, this birthday card was about Rafayel accepting that he can experience love without needing to suffer first. I believe this card was very thoughtfully constructed and emotionally consistent. It made my heart hurt with joy, and I’ve drawn a lot closer to him now because of it.

Rafayel… you didn’t have to take the expression “birthday suit” literally

It was supposed to be your birthday, not mine 😳

My boys always have a free reign of their closet, and this is what Raf decided to greet me in on his bday pfft. What’s extra funny is that not one of them have EVER worn the towel outfit around our home 😂 In contrast, he was wearing the kitty butler fit in the cafe 🐱

Anyways, happy birthday again to our naughty fishie 😙💕

They’re so pretty ✨🥹

I want to wear them everyday, but at the same time I want to just keep them in my jewelry box 😅

He said it again

We got “okie dokie artichokie” again. 😂 And it’s voiced this time, not just a text message 😂 I keep saying I’m not a Rafayel girl but if he keeps making me laugh like this we’re gonna have a problem… and that problem is that I CANNOT AFFORD another LI. 😭

Moi en Art Therapy

Nobody will know I secretly made a LaDs sculpture 😁

Happy Birthday Rafayel 🐡🎂

So here is my Rafayel's plushie and I love it so much since it looks so adorable 🥰

Rafayel is my third favorite from all of guys as I enjoy how dramatic and sassy he can be. So while he isn't my main I like him very much.

If I have to summarize the whole event it was pretty good. I liked the minigame and it was pretty fun. I always preferred these more logical games over jumping around (like the Masquerade skating minigame during anniversary event, don't get me wrong it was alright but I'm a someone who prefers to think over stuff and have slower reactions so I can get pretty confused.)

But I would be lying if I said that I wasn't also disappointed. I started playing during August 2025 so I experienced Zayne's and Xavier's birthdays and I loved the whole decorating cakes stuff. And it makes me sad that I was able to experience this with them and not with my favorites LaDs men (mainly Sylus and Caleb). 

Sure the plushie as I said is cute but it's pretty limited when it comes to decorating and I honestly wasn't having that much fun to it because I basically had my hands tied to how the plushie can look like.

I understand the whole stuff about how some people were inappropriate during last birthday events and while I haven't seen any of these works I can only imagine how their cakes looked like. 

So while I enjoyed the minigame I wasn't really satisfied with decorating plushie as for me it was restricted and had pretty limited options so I didn't enjoy it because of this issue.

Anyway once more I wish Happy Birthday to our fishie and I hope that he won't have ever again experience his birthday alone with only slice of cake 🐡🐡🎂

op:https://www.xiaohongshu.com/explore/69aa5ea9000000001d02531a?xsec_token=ABS5nngnN9VYG6pNOX76KdFMRwA6heeGMyWL_oTdMZvhE=&xsec_source=pc_user

Caleb Dress-up Doll

Look at how cute he iss!!❤️ I especially love the little insignia on his foot✨ And he came with a birth certificate card too!🪪

As for the whole set he comes with jacket, hooded sweatshirt with embroidered apple necklace, black pants with belt, shoes, magnetic apple head accessory🍎

For the quality I'm not doll collector tbf but he feels good quality to me. The doll himself is nice and plush and his clothes are good thickness fabric and the stitching pretty neat as well. I didn't have too bad a time undressing him (I have plans to buy him some more memory outfitss) and his clothes are still all in one piece after putting em on and off. Albeit though since the clothes are decently thick it does get more difficult to maneuver, particularly the sleeves as he's double layered with the sweatshirt and the jacket outerwear.

He does have a tag on his bum too! I'll spare y'all the naked doll 😂

The apple head accessory is magnetic and is stored in a box underneath the doll box which kinda also acts like a riser so he displays nicely in the box if you don't want to unbox him.

Very happy with the doll myself!!
